description_long: This hurdle features two sturdy, slightly flared vertical posts connected at the base by a horizontal stabilizing bar. The top of the hurdle is adorned with a wide, checkered banner in black and white, with the word 'FINISH' prominently displayed in bold gold letters on one side. The posts appear to be made of a dark, possibly metallic or composite material, with reddish-brown end caps. The checkered banner is taut and visually striking, designed to be highly visible from a distance. The overall construction suggests durability and stability, suitable for repeated use in outdoor environments. The design is functional and iconic, commonly seen at the finish line of races or sporting events.
description: A sturdy hurdle with black and white checkered banner and bold 'FINISH' lettering, supported by two dark vertical posts and a stabilizing base bar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the checkered banner without text, supported by two dark posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the hurdle and the depth of the posts.
description_view_2: Front view with the 'FINISH' text clearly visible on the checkered banner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin profile and post structure.
attribute_bar_arrangement: One horizontal checkered banner at the top, two vertical posts, and a single horizontal stabilizing bar at the base.
